current_commit_message: Add command aliases for CLI ergonomics (rm, ls, regen, s, idx)
Add --yes flag to remove/audit and --llm flag to add/regenerate
Add backend and embed config support for LEANN index
fix(leann): align incremental behavior
test(leann): cover meta helpers
feat(search): add --papers/-p option to scope search to specific papers
fix(cli): use appropriate message for single vs multiple fuzzy matches
feat(cli): add normalized disk fallback for out-of-sync index
fix(cli): clarify --rg is literal-match, not regex by default
fix(cli): continue processing remaining papers when title search fails
feat(cli): support adding papers by direct PDF URL
feat(cli): add warning when --repo skips skill install
feat(cli): support adding multiple papers at once, mixed sources
feat: extract paper title and short name from pdf in one call
feat(search): batch search index commits and remove orphans
fix(leann): sanitize extracted text for utf-8 surrogates
feat(paper): extract text from PDF when no LaTeX source available
feat(paper): improve LLM prompts to reduce hallucination
feat(paper): add source_url provenance tracking for local PDFs
feat(cli): add early duplicate detection by source URL
fix(paper): add debug logging to silent exception handlers
test(paper): add integration tests for PDF text extraction fallback
fix(regenerate): update pdf_path after rename, respect --overwrite semantics
test(leann): isolate env vars in gemini default test
fix: address PR review issues for pdf-extraction-and-dedup
fix: catch RuntimeError for PyMuPDF exceptions
fix: address PR review comments (P1, P2)
feat(cli): remove max_chars limit, add context window check
feat(cli): add fallback context window map for common models
fix: correct context window values from litellm verification
chore: clean up context window map, fix gpt-5 value
refactor: update context window map with current 2026 models
fix: harden deserialization, path traversal, log redaction, and size limits
fix: address code review findings on security PR
fix: add defensive guards and prevent temp file leaks
fix: improve figure extraction performance and handle basename collisions
fix: address code review findings on robustness PR
fix(leann): remove non-functional filter/grep flags, add rejection guards
feat(ask): detect PQA failure kinds with actionable guidance
fix(agent): portable skill format and Codex install path
fix(agent): revert Codex skill path to ~/.codex/skills
